pipelines.name: reid_{{CAMERA_NAME}}
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://mediaserver:8554/{{CAMERA_NAME}} latency=200 protocols=tcp ! decodebin3 ! videorate ! video/x-raw(memory:VAMemory),framerate=25/1 ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! gvadetect scheduling-policy=latency inference-interval=2 nireq=4 model=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/{{DETECT_MODEL}}/{{DETECT_MODEL}}.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/{{DETECT_MODEL}}/yolo-v8.json labels-file=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/{{DETECT_MODEL}}/labels.txt name=detection device=GPU pre-process-backend=va-surface-sharing ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert ! vapostproc ! video/x-raw,format=BGRA ! videoconvert ! video/x-raw,format=BGR ! gvainference nireq=4 model=/home/pipeline-server/models/reid/{{REID_MODEL}}/{{REID_MODEL}}.xml inference-region=roi-list device={{REID_DEVICE}} ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true
